tasks.subject: Feature importance analysis documented in decisions.md with top 10 features ranked
tasks.description: Perform feature importance analysis and document findings

subtasks.subject: Document top-10 features ranked by importance in DECISION-008
subtasks.description:
Append DECISION-008 to .claude/worktrees/SPRINT-001/SK-002/project2/docs/architecture/decisions.md

Include top-10 features table with columns: Rank, Feature, Category, Expected Impact

Top 10 features ranked by SHAP importance:
1. eFG% differential (Four Factors) - High
2. DRB% (Four Factors) - High
3. TOV% (Four Factors) - High
4. Net Rating (Advanced) - High
5. Win % (Context) - High
6. Home/Away flag (Context) - High
7. ORTG differential (Advanced) - Medium
8. FTR (Four Factors) - Medium
9. OREB% (Four Factors) - Medium
10. 3PAr (Style) - Medium

tasks.subject: Recommendation includes feature set with pros/cons and expected accuracy impact
tasks.description: Develop feature set recommendations with trade-offs

subtasks.subject: Document feature set comparison and pros/cons in DECISION-008
subtasks.description:
Append feature set comparison table to DECISION-008 in .claude/worktrees/SPRINT-001/SK-002/project2/docs/architecture/decisions.md

Include columns: Set, Features, Pros, Cons, Expected Accuracy

Feature sets:
- A (Basic): 6 features, simple/low complexity, no pace adjustment, 63-67% accuracy
- B (Four Factors): 9 features, theory-grounded/pace-adjusted, needs box score aggregation, 67-70% accuracy
- C (Extended): 13 features, highest accuracy/momentum+fatigue, more complex pipeline, 70-74% accuracy

Decision: Use Combo C as production feature set. AUC target > 0.72.

subtasks.subject: Write failing tests - TestShapAnalysis class (4 tests)
subtasks.description:
Create tests in pipeline/tests/test_feature_combinations.py:

TestShapAnalysis:
- test_shap_values_shape_matches_features - SHAP array shape (n_samples, n_features)
- test_feature_importances_are_non_negative - all mean |SHAP| values >= 0
- test_top_n_features_returns_correct_count - get_top_n_features(..., n=10) returns 10 tuples
- test_top_n_features_sorted_descending - sorted by importance descending

subtasks.subject: Implement prototype_train.py to pass all tests
subtasks.description:
Create pipeline/model/prototype_train.py with:

Constants:
- XGBOOST_PARAMS, CV_N_SPLITS=5, CV_GAP=1, ROLLING_WINDOW=10
- COMBO_A_FEATURES (6), COMBO_B_FEATURES (9), COMBO_C_FEATURES (13)

Functions (all with type hints):
1. make_game_rows(n: int, seed: int = 42) -> pd.DataFrame
2. add_rolling_features(df, window) -> df (MUST use .shift(1).rolling())
3. train_combo(X, y, combo) -> dict with accuracy and importances
4. compute_shap_values(model, X) -> np.ndarray with list-return guard
5. get_top_n_features(shap_values, feature_names, n=10) -> list[tuple]
6. run_all_combos(df) -> list[dict]
7. main() -> CLI entry point

Critical: .shift(1).rolling() pattern prevents temporal data leakage.

subtasks.subject: Verify tests pass and prototype script runs
subtasks.description:
Run:
1. pytest pipeline/tests/test_feature_combinations.py -v (all 16 tests pass)
2. python pipeline/model/prototype_train.py (prints comparison table + top-10 features)

Verify:
- All 16 tests pass
- Script prints 3-combo comparison table
- Script prints top-10 features ranked by SHAP

tasks.subject: Install ML dependencies via pipeline/requirements.txt
tasks.description: Create pipeline/requirements.txt with the following ML dependencies: xgboost>=2.0, scikit-learn>=1.4, pandas>=2.0, numpy>=2.0, shap>=0.45, nba_api>=1.4, pytest>=8.0, pytest-cov>=5.0. Then run: pip install -r pipeline/requirements.txt to install all dependencies.
